definition.en: In actuality there is only a spacious present, so spacious that it cannot be explored all at once in your terms, hence your arbitrary division of it into larger rooms of past, present and future.
definition.zh: 实际上只有一个广袤的当下，它如此广阔，以至于无法以你们的方式一次探索完毕，因此你们武断地将其分割成过去、现在和未来这些更大的房间。

definition.en: The spacious present is the basic time in which the whole self has its existence, but the various portions of that self have their experience in their own time systems, which are the results of their characteristic methods of perception.
definition.zh: 广袤的当下是整体自我存在的基本时间，但自我的各个部分在其自身的时间系统中拥有经验，这些时间系统是其特有感知方法的结果。

definition.en: Our next law of the inner universe is the capacity for infinite mobility, this occurring within the spacious present, which is an infinite spacious present.
definition.zh: 我们内在宇宙的下一个法则是无限移动的能力，这发生在广袤的当下之内，而广袤的当下是一个无限的广袤当下。

definition.en: I have told you that all consciousnesses exist in the spacious present, which is spontaneous while also durable.
definition.zh: 我曾告诉你们，所有意识都存在于广袤的当下中，它既是自发的，也是持久的。

definition.en: When the spacious present is understood, with its attributes of spontaneity, then the cause and effect theory will fall.
definition.zh: 当理解了广袤的当下及其自发性属性时，因果理论就会瓦解。

explanation:
「广阔当下」是赛斯对时间本质的核心描述：不存在过去、现在、未来的线性分割，只有唯一且无限延展的当下。这个当下如此广阔，以至于所有事件——你认为是“过去”的、“未来”的，甚至不同转世的生命——都同时发生并存在于其中。线性时间只是人类神经系统和肉体感官为了聚焦体验而施加的“限制装置”，并非真实的时间结构。

在广阔当下中，因果律失效，因为事件并非前后相继，而是同时并存。这个当下同时具备“自发性”和“持久性”两种属性：它瞬间生成一切，却又因“价值完成”而拥有内在的延续感。梦境、艺术创作、超感官知觉（如千里眼）之所以可能，正是因为它们直接触及了广阔当下的本质——在这些状态下，

quotes.text: I was about your establishment earlier, and Ruburt was right. There was a purpose in his misreading. Actually, subconsciously he picked up my thoughts on this occasion. He picked them up a few minutes earlier but his mind waited for a suitable occasion to transpose the word spacious in connection with the present. The spacious present is an excellent term. In actuality there is only a spacious present, so spacious that it cannot be explored all at once in your terms, hence your arbitrary division of it into larger rooms of past, present and future.
quotes.translation: 我之前就提到过你们的建立，鲁柏是对的。他误读是有目的的。实际上，这次他潜意识里接收到了我的想法。他提前几分钟就接收到了，但他的心智在等待合适的时机，将"广袤"这个词与"当下"联系起来。"广袤的当下"这个说法非常精妙。实际上，只有一个广袤的当下，它如此广袤，以至于在你们的说法里无法一次性完全探索，因此你们武断地将其分割成过去、现在和未来这些更大的房间。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Now returning briefly, I would like again to mention our spacious present, in which all things have their existence. When the spacious present is understood, with its attributes of spontaneity, then the cause and effect theory will fall. The cause and effect theory being the result of continuity holds no water. Basically, the spacious present as you know does have durability, because of the existence of value fulfillment.
quotes.translation: 现在简短地回到主题，我想再次提及我们的广袤当下，所有事物都在其中存在。当广袤的当下被理解，连同其自发性特质，那么因果理论就会瓦解。因果理论作为连续性的结果，是站不住脚的。基本上，你们所知的广袤当下确实具有持久性，因为存在价值完成。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Remember that reincarnation does not contradict the theory of the spacious present , for such lives within the spacious present are simultaneous. In dreams you journey through inner realities as actually as you walk physically through the matter of the physical world. It is true that the experiences you encounter may not be encountered by another in precisely (underline precisely) the same way, but physical experience is never the same for any two given individuals either.
quotes.translation: 记住，转世并不与广袤当下的理论相矛盾，因为在广袤当下中的这些生命是同时发生的。在梦中，你穿越内在实相，就像你实际在物质世界中行走于物质之中一样真实。确实，你所遭遇的经历可能不会被另一个人以完全相同的方式遭遇，但物质体验对任何两个个体来说也从来不会完全相同。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: The spacious present is always present(smile)--my pun--in any work of art. As you should know, there is a difference in the type of mobility of an objective painting, and an abstract one. The fluidity or the spacious present pervades the dream state as it pervades a painting, but the images are projected into the spacious present by the dreamer, according to his own understanding and experience.
quotes.translation: 广袤的当下总是存在于任何艺术品中（微笑）——我的双关语。正如你应该知道的，客观绘画和抽象绘画的流动性类型有所不同。流动性或广袤的当下弥漫于梦境状态，就像它弥漫于一幅画中，但梦者根据自身的理解和经验，将意象投射到广袤的当下中。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: At such times I'm apt to think about ideas of reincarnation and counterparts. Right here I'm dealing with just two of Seth's larger concepts. But without dwelling upon them too heavily, I may consider the notion of my larger, nonphysical "whole self" or "entity" being made up of a number of other psychically related physical selves projected into time. For Seth, basically there is no time, only a great "spacious present" that's a manifestation of a sublime, indescribable All That Is. Our gross physical senses, and indeed our very bodies, insist upon interpreting the spacious present in linear terms, however--through the inevitable processes of birth, aging, and death--so to help us get his point here Seth advances his ideas of reincarnational selves and counterpart selves in ways we can understand sensually.
quotes.translation: 在这种时候，我倾向于思考转世和对应体的概念。这里我正好在处理赛斯两个更大的概念。但不过分沉溺于它们，我可以考虑我的更大、非物质的"整体自己"或"存有"的概念，它由许多其他心灵相关的物质自己组成，这些自己投射到时间中。对赛斯来说，基本上没有时间，只有一个伟大的"广袤当下"，它是崇高、难以描述的一切万有的显现。然而，我们粗重的物质感官，甚至我们的身体本身，都坚持用线性方式解释广袤当下——通过出生、衰老和死亡这些不可避免的过程——所以为了帮助我们理解他的观点，赛斯在此以我们能感官理解的方式，提出了他的转世自己和对应体自己的概念。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: Even in God of Jane, which was published in 1981, Jane presented some relatively late material from Seth to show that he doesn't independently communicate with others. The idea that he'd done so can be inspiring, however. In Chapter 20 of her book, see Session 876 for August 27, 1979. After explaining how a couple of women (among others) had recently claimed that he had been in contact with them, Seth stated: "Now, I did not communicate with those women--but their belief in me helped each of them use certain abilities."
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 6: Genetic Heritage and Reincarnational Predilections

quotes.text: Now, the time in which the inner ego exists is, as you know, the spacious present. The spacious present is the basic time in which the whole self has its existence, but the various portions of that self have their experience in their own time systems, which are the results of their characteristic methods of perception.
quotes.translation: 现在，内在自我存在的时间，如你所知，就是广袤的当下。广袤的当下是整体自己存在的基本时间，但那个自己的各个部分在它们自己的时间系统中拥有体验，这些时间系统是它们特有感知方法的结果。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: You will need perhaps to reread your material on the spacious present, since our explanation here will be necessarily in terms of sequence of events, when as you know in the spacious present events are actually simultaneous. When the personality withdraws itself from the physical image therefore, in a sort of slow motion of actual simultaneous happenings, this is what occurs.
quotes.translation: 你或许需要重读关于"广袤当下"的资料，因为我们的解释必然涉及事件序列，而如你所知，在广袤当下中事件实际上是同时发生的。当人格以某种实际同时发生的慢动作方式脱离物质形象时，就会发生这种情况。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The spacious present does not contradict the existence of durability, but durability does not imply the existence of a future as you conceive it. Now this may appear contradictory, but later I hope that you will understand this more clearly. The spacious present, while existing spontaneously, while happening simultaneously, still contains within it qualities of duration.
quotes.translation: 广袤当下并不否定持久性的存在，但持久性并不意味着存在你所理解的未来。这看似矛盾，但稍后我希望你能更清晰地理解这一点。广袤当下虽然自发存在、同时发生，却仍包含持续性的特质。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: It may be another version of yourself. We will discuss ways of distinguishing between these. A man may suddenly disappear, and to be replaced by a small girl, a nonsensical development to the logical mind. Yet the girl could be the form of the man's previous or future reincarnated self. The unity, you see, is different. Basically perception of the spacious present is naturally available. It is your nervous and physical mechanism which acts as a limiting device, and also as a focusing device. By limiting many otherwise available perceptions it forces you to focus upon what you can perceive with greater intensity.
quotes.translation: 那可能是你自己的另一个版本。我们将讨论区分这些版本的方法。一个人可能突然消失，取而代之的是一个小女孩——这对逻辑思维而言是荒谬的发展。然而这个女孩可能是此人前世或来世转世自我的形态。你看，统一性是不同的。对广袤当下的感知本质上自然可得，是你的神经和生理机制充当了限制装置，同时也作为聚焦装置。通过限制许多本可获得的感知，它迫使你以更强烈的专注力聚焦于所能感知的事物。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: What about the cycles of history? You spoke of these I believe a few days ago. What about the spacious present and your quasars? What about your spacious present and the predictions, for example, of Nostradamus? What about the spacious present and its connection with evolution? All of these questions follow naturally, and should be here answered.
quotes.translation: 历史的循环又如何？我相信你几天前曾提及这些。广袤当下与你们的类星体有何关联？广袤当下与诺查丹玛斯的预言又有何关联？广袤当下与进化论的联系何在？这些问题自然接踵而至，在此应当得到解答。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Philip should read the sessions dealing particularly with the laws of the universe, that is with the inner laws of the universe, appreciating then the facts that this universe within all universes is spontaneous while having durability. It would be backtracking to repeat that long discussion, but as the inner universe has as its attributes spontaneity and durability, and as the spacious present is simultaneous while containing within it all pasts and all presents and all futures, and as Philip understands the meaning of expansion in terms not of time or of space but of value fulfillment, so will he intuitively then grasp that no contradiction occurs with actual reality when I say that there is no beginning and no end.
quotes.translation: 菲利普应研读那些特别讨论宇宙法则的课节，即内在宇宙法则，从而领悟这个万有宇宙中的宇宙既自发又具有持久性的事实。重复那场冗长的讨论无异于倒退，但既然内在宇宙的属性是自发性和持久性，既然广袤当下同时包含所有过去、现在和未来，既然菲利普理解"扩展"并非指时间或空间，而是指价值完成，那么当他听到我说没有起点也没有终点时，就能凭直觉把握这与实际现实并无矛盾。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Our next law of the inner universe is the capacity for infinite mobility, this occurring within the spacious present, which is an infinite spacious present.
quotes.translation: 我们内在宇宙的下一条法则是无限移动的能力，这发生在广袤当下之中——一个无限的广袤当下。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Now. As I have told you, there is duration of a kind. What would correspond, in any case, to your idea of duration within the spacious present ; it is a matter of intensities however. Now the entity is in itself composed of such intensities. Simply for the sake of analogy, imagine the image, a humanoid one, of an entity giant-sized, spread out anywhere in your physical universe. And if the image were projected against a midnight sky, within its apparent boundaries then you would see a multitude of planets and stars. Let these represent moment points. On one hand they are a part of the entity, as your cells are a portion of your body. On the other hand the entity's consciousness can travel through these. They are doorways within his own psychological makeup, into experiences.
quotes.translation: 当下。正如我曾告诉你的，存在某种持续性。无论如何，在广袤的当下中，这对应于你对持续性的概念；然而这关乎强度的问题。存有本身即由这样的强度构成。仅以类比而言，想象一个类人形态的存有影像，体型巨大，散布在你物质宇宙的任何地方。若将此影像投射于午夜天空，在其看似清晰的边界内，你会看到众多行星与星辰。让这些代表瞬间点。一方面，它们是存有的一部分，正如你的细胞是你身体的一部分。另一方面，存有的意识可以穿越这些瞬间点。它们是他自身心理结构中的门户，通往各种体验。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Clairvoyance exists and is possible because of its basis within the spacious present, and this is not known because man will not accept the available data. Clairvoyance exists because matter and energy are one and the same thing. There is clairvoyance within the organs of the physical body itself, because the organs of the body are not, quote, "just" matter, but energy which has composed itself into matter. Such inner data continually and automatically is accepted by every other portion of the human framework except by the outer ego. Even this outer ego, however, acts all unknowingly often on the basis of such information, which it will not admit it has received; and often such action saves it from dire circumstances.
quotes.translation: 千里眼之所以存在且可能，是因为其基础在于广袤的当下，而这一点不为人知，因为人类不愿接受可用的数据。千里眼之所以存在，是因为物质与能量是同一回事。在物质身体本身的器官内存在千里眼，因为身体的器官并非"只是"物质，而是已将自己组合成物质的能量。这样的内在数据持续且自动地被人类架构的每一其他部分所接受，唯独外在自我除外。然而，即使是这个外在自我，也常常在不知不觉中依据这类它不愿承认已接收的信息行事；而这样的行动往往使其免于险境。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The mind will be found to be closely allied with the spacious present. The mind's capabilities, if studied, would lead man into a realization of these other fields of actuality of which I have spoken. The mind deals with intangibles, but it does not deal with unrealities. Again, the validity of an actuality is not to be determined by its appearance within matter alone. The ingredients of matter are first of all intangible ingredients, and the study of the mind and a study of the processes by which the mind creates its dream images could lead to a basic understanding of the manner in which man subconsciously produces the physical images of his own material universe.
quotes.translation: 心智将被发现与广袤的当下紧密相连。若研究心智的能力，将引导人类认识到我所谈到的这些其他实相领域。心智处理无形之物，但它并不处理不实之物。再次强调，实相的有效性不应仅由其出现在物质中的形式来决定。物质的成分首先是无形的成分，而对心智的研究，以及对心智创造其梦境影像的过程的研究，可以引导人们基本理解人类潜意识中如何产生其自身物质宇宙的物质影像。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: In the beginning there was instead, once more, a divine psychological gestalt--and by that I mean a being whose reality escapes the definition of the word "being," since it is the source from which all being emerges. That being exists in a psychological dimension (long pause), a spacious present, in which everything that was or is or will be (in your terms) is kept in immediate attention, poised in a divine context that is characterized (long pause, eyes closed) by such a brilliant concentration that the grandest and the lowliest, the largest and the smallest, are equally held in a multiloving constant focus.
quotes.translation: 起初，再次存在一个神圣的心理完形——我指的是一个存在，其现实超越了"存在"一词的定义，因为它是所有存在涌现的源头。那个存在于一个心理维度（长停顿），一个广袤的当下中，在那里，一切曾经、正在或将要（以你的说法）存在的事物，都被保持于即时的关注中，悬置于一个神圣的脉络中，其特征是（长停顿，闭眼）如此辉煌的专注，以至于最伟大与最卑微、最大与最小，都被平等地保持在一种多重爱的恒定焦点中。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: In your terms, the rate at which you discover the facets and realities of the spacious present becomes your camouflage time. On your plane there must be physical manipulation. This gives you also the illusion of past and future, and to you it appears that the present is a fleeting, almost ashen illusion in itself, beyond any true remembrance and beyond the reach of any but nostalgic recall. This is also caused by your camouflage system in which physical materializations appear and grow, mature and disappear.
quotes.translation: 以你的说法，你发现广袤当下的面向与实相的速度，成为你的伪装时间。在你的层面上，必须有物质操控。这也给了你过去与未来的幻象，对你而言，当下本身似乎是一种短暂、几乎如灰烬般的幻象，超越任何真实的记忆，且除了怀旧的回忆外无法触及。这也是由你的伪装系统造成的，在该系统中，物质显化出现、成长、成熟并消失。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Now. I have just told you that one thought must terminate before another thought can appear. Although this might sound as if I am speaking in terms of continuity, I am not. The action of our imaginary sphere upon and within itself is simultaneous, and in all directions. All actions occur basically within the spacious present, but all action cannot be aware of itself except as it attempts further action, i.e., materializations.
quotes.translation: 现在。我刚刚告诉你，一个念头必须终止，另一个念头才能出现。虽然这听起来好像我在谈论连续性，但我并非如此。我们假想的球体在其自身内部及对自身的行动是同时发生的，且向所有方向进行。所有行动基本上都发生在广袤的当下之内，但所有行动除非它尝试进一步行动（即物质化），否则无法意识到自身。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Such developments would mean the releasing and availability of added energy into your field, that would have endless possibilities in all directions. Ideas and concepts are nonphysical actualities that attract unaligned energy, direct and concentrate it. The dream world exists more closely in that spacious present of which the inner self is so aware. It is not as involved with camouflage constructions as your own universe, and its actions are somewhat limited within its own framework.
quotes.translation: 这类发展意味着将额外能量释放并注入你们的场域，这些能量将在所有方向上拥有无限可能。思想与概念是非物质的实相，它们吸引未定向的能量，引导并凝聚之。梦境世界更贴近于那个内在自体如此熟悉的"广袤当下"。它不像你们的宇宙那样卷入伪装建构，其活动在其自身框架内也受到一定限制。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: A hundred and forty-five B.C., a hundred and forty-five A.D., a thousand years in your past and a thousand years in your present--all exist now. Therefore the past existences are present existences. You exist in other words in several guises or reincarnations, at one time within the spacious present. You simply do not recognize that the so-called past exists now as surely as the so-called future exists now.
quotes.translation: 公元前145年、公元145年、你们过去的一千年与现在的一千年——所有这些都同时存在于当下。因此，过去的存在即是现在的存在。换言之，你们以多种面貌或转世形态同时存在于广袤当下之中。你们只是尚未认识到：所谓的过去与所谓的未来一样，都确凿无疑地存在于当下。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Action is not affected by time as you know it. Action also takes place within the spacious present. You may, however, only perceive parts of action in your time breakdown. Ideally, psychological time experiences will allow you to perceive action more clearly and directly. The ego attempts to control action by standing apart from it. Any such division is arbitrary, and in no way affects the nature of action itself. All that changes is your perception of it.
quotes.translation: 行动不受你们所认知的时间影响。行动同样发生在广袤当下之内。然而，你们只能通过时间分解来感知行动的片段。理想状态下，心理时间体验将使你们更清晰直接地感知行动。自我试图通过置身事外来控制行动，但这种划分是武断的，丝毫不会改变行动本身的本质——改变的只是你们对它的感知。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: I am speaking now for your convenience simply. There are four cornerstone personalities involved in your seminar. Now three of these personalities are yours: one is not yours. One is not"yours" in your terms as of this time. When you look up and recognize, you will accept that which you do not now recognize as yourself, as yourself. If you looked up now, you would not recognize the self that you will recognize. Because the Spacious present exists as it is, the recognition has already been made. You have not yet caught up with it, you see. You are slowpokes. My friend Ruburt in many respects is also a slowpoke. The environment is not where you think it is. I refer to these seminars. The voice that does not"speak" in your terms is yours, but the instructor is not yourself as you know yourself. It is a self you do not as yet know in your terms.
quotes.translation: 我现在仅为方便你们理解而简化说明。你们的研讨班涉及四位基石人格。其中三位属于你们，一位不属于你们。以你们当前的时间观念来看，那位"不属于"你们。当你们抬头辨认时，将会接纳那个此刻尚未被你们认作自身的自己。若你们此刻抬头，将无法认出那个未来才会认出的自己。正因为广袤当下如其所是地存在，这份认知早已完成——只是你们尚未赶上它，明白吗？你们都是慢吞吞的家伙。我的朋友鲁柏在许多方面也是个慢吞吞的人。环境并非你们以为的那个所在——我指的是这些研讨班。那个以你们术语而言"不发声"的声音属于你们，但指导者并非你们所认知的自己。那是你们以自身术语尚不了解的一个自己。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: In other words, a dream allows the inner self to view itself within the spacious present. Now, chemically the physical body does need to dream. That is, dreaming is a necessity if the physical body is to survive. This is the result of certain chemical reactions and chemical necessities, chemical excesses that build up during the days, inciting the mental dream mechanism.
quotes.translation: 换言之，梦境让内在自体得以在广袤当下中观照自身。从化学层面而言，物质身体确实需要做梦——若要让物质身体存活，做梦是必要条件。这是某些化学反应与化学需求的结果：白天积累的化学过剩物质会激发心理层面的做梦机制。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: And in each of these planes of existence there is a reflection of the basic laws of the spacious present itself, which I am in the process of giving you. Therefore there is no need, really, to think of a given group of entities before the birth of your planet. I have said that all the entities who would ever dwell upon your plane did exist, and actually have a hand in on the creation of your planet, that would ever dwell upon it.
quotes.translation: 在这些存在层面中，每一个都映照着广袤当下的基本法则——我此刻正在向你们传授这些法则。因此，你们实在无需在行星诞生前设想某个特定群体。我曾说过：所有曾栖居、将栖居于你们层面的存有，确实都曾存在，并实际参与了你们行星的创造。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: (Smile, eyes open.) Short range predictions would be most difficult for me, since I cannot break down time as you think of it to that degree. I perceive instead at one glance seemingly whole segments of your time field. (Pause.) Seth as you knew him perceives your own system more clearly. (Pause.) From my viewpoint (pause) I do not perceive your physical universe then as you do. I do perceive your psychic values and Emotional intensities, and realize that you perceive but very small segments of these. As you break down the spacious present into moments, which you then experience, so also you break down psychic identity, gestalts, into small self structures.
quotes.translation: （微笑，睁眼。）短期预测对我来说最为困难，因为我无法像你那样将时间分解到那种程度。相反，我一眼就能感知你时间场域中看似完整的片段。（停顿。）你所认识的赛斯更清晰地感知你的系统。（停顿。）从我的视角来看（停顿），我并非像你那样感知你的物质宇宙。我确实感知到你的心灵价值和情感强度，并意识到你只感知到这些的极小片段。正如你将广袤当下分解为片刻，然后体验这些片刻，你也将心灵身份、完形分解为小的自我结构。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: I have told you that all consciousnesses exist in the spacious present, which is spontaneous while also durable. Then it is no contradiction to say that entities existed before the birth of your planet, though in your time it seems that new ones are being brought to consciousness.
quotes.translation: 我曾告诉过你，所有意识都存在于广袤当下中，它既是自发的，也是持久的。因此，说实体在你星球诞生之前就已存在，这并非矛盾，尽管在你的时间里，似乎有新的实体正在被带入意识。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Now, in one sense, all selves are projections of the whole or that which is. New universes such as your own constantly come into existence. Systems and planes far different develop and in turn form other systems. Infinity has meaning only in subjective and psychic terms. The physical brain cannot contain the idea of infinity. The concept will not fit into three dimensional terms. The whole self, the inner self moves within the concept of infinity as you move within physical reality through space. Infinity contains all that will ever be known, and, of course, all that will ever be known is known within the spacious present .
quotes.translation: 现在，从某种意义上说，所有自我都是整体或"存在本身"的投射。像你们这样的新宇宙不断诞生。截然不同的系统和层面发展起来，并反过来形成其他系统。无限只在主观和心灵层面有意义。物质大脑无法容纳无限的概念。这个概念无法融入三维术语。整体自我、内在自我在无限的概念中移动，就像你在物质现实中通过空间移动一样。无限包含所有将被知晓的一切，当然，所有将被知晓的一切都在广袤当下中被知晓。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: I have wanted to cover this because I can prove the existence of this dream world to you, and its continuity, always within the spacious present. You must understand psychological reality, psychological time, psychological experience, and the dream existence before you can learn to utilize many abilities, since in all the mentioned aspects, you use your abilities, that is your inner senses, on a subconscious level.
quotes.translation: 我一直想涵盖这一点，因为我可以向你证明这个梦境世界的存在及其连续性，始终在广袤当下之内。你必须理解心理现实、心理时间、心理体验和梦境存在，然后才能学会运用许多能力，因为在所有提到的方面，你都在潜意识层面运用你的能力，即你的内在感官。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: I also said that new entities were being formed, but in the framework of the spacious present all this is spontaneous. The contradiction seems a contradiction only on your terms. On my terms there is none. For practical purposes you may say, in truth on your own terms, that entities simply have had time to develop further personalities. But I want it understood that this is true only within your own time framework.
quotes.translation: 我还说过新的实体正在形成，但在广袤当下的框架内，这一切都是自发的。这个矛盾似乎只是在你看来是矛盾。在我这里没有矛盾。为了实用目的，你可以说，实际上按照你自己的说法，实体只是有时间进一步发展人格。但我希望你们明白，这只有在你们自己的时间框架内才成立。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Just before the experience of death, timelessness, or the spacious present, begins to be perceived. It is because the ego is tied to its past that it sees the past seemingly rise up. It has the ability to see what is coming, so to speak, but while the frightened ego is still in control it chooses to see only a portion of what is possible, and before the point of death it usually chooses to hide in the past.
quotes.translation: 就在死亡体验之前，无时间性或广袤当下开始被感知。正是因为自我与它的过去紧密相连，它才看到过去似乎浮现出来。可以说，它有能力看到即将到来的事物，但当受惊的自我仍在掌控时，它选择只看到可能事物的一部分，而在死亡点之前，它通常选择躲藏在过去中。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: The number one time cannot contain other times but the consciousness, with help, can to some extent perceive these other times. And this perception then allows consciousness to escape some of the confinements of that one time. Our spacious present of which I have spoken contains all times, but it is not a thing apart from them, nor precisely their sum. It is ever unfolding and mobile, and changing itself.
quotes.translation: 首要时间无法包含其他时间，但意识在协助下能在某种程度上感知这些其他时间。而这种感知随后使意识得以摆脱该时间的某些束缚。我所提及的广袤当下包含所有时间，但它并非独立于时间之外的事物，也并非时间的精确总和。它始终在展开、流动，并不断自我改变。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: To those who ask concerning the origin of that inward energy you may say that the inwardness came from itself. In the spacious present there simply is no past. There can be no point of origin in time as you conceive it. It is only within your camouflage perspective that this remark appears illogical, but this does not mean that you still cannot grasp some of its meaning, using your own inner experience.
quotes.translation: 对于那些询问内在能量起源的人，你可以说内在性源于自身。在广袤当下中根本不存在过去。在你所构想的时间中不可能存在起源点。只有在你那伪装视角下，这句话才显得不合逻辑，但这并不意味着你无法运用自身内在经验来领会其部分含义。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The spacious present is much more a vivid reality to those outside of your system. Your time seems marked, individually, by birth and death. When these are known for what they are, when the personality can change form at will, such quote "timing" is meaningless.
quotes.translation: 对于你们系统之外的存在而言，广袤当下是更为鲜活的实相。你们的时间以个体出生与死亡为标记。当这些被认清本质，当人格能随意改变形态时，这种所谓的"计时"便毫无意义。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: We are dealing here principally, and in the main, with the essence of action, and essentially all apparent divisions are arbitrary for the sake of explanation. The moment point is in itself arbitrary, an artificial division. As we have said, the moment point for you is actually composed of the amount of action which you are capable of assimilating within your present framework, for the moment point is indeed a portion of the spacious present.
quotes.translation: 我们在此主要探讨行动的本质，本质上所有表面划分都是为了解释而作的武断区分。瞬间点本身是武断的、人为的划分。如我们所说，你们的瞬间点实际上由你当前框架内所能同化的行动量构成，因为瞬间点确实是广袤当下的一部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Beneath these root assumptions however portions of the self perceive physical reality in an entirely different fashion, free of the tyranny of objects and material form. Here you experience concepts directly, without the need for symbolisms. Here you experience the spacious present directly. Here you have knowledge of your past personalities, and know that they exist simultaneously with your own.
quotes.translation: 然而在这些根本假设之下，自我的部分以完全不同的方式感知物质实相，摆脱了物体与物质形态的束缚。在此你直接体验概念，无需象征符号。在此你直接体验广袤当下。在此你知晓自己过去的人格，并知道它们与你的当前人格同时存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: The thoughts would not be perceived if they were present, you see. If a certain intensity is reached here however, a peak of intensity, then you could perceive the spacious present as it exists within your native system. You could, from this peak, theoretically look into the other system, but you would not understand what you perceived. You would not have the proper root assumptions, you see.
quotes.translation: 若思想在场时你反而无法感知，明白吗。但若在此达到某种强度峰值，你便能感知存在于你原生系统中的广袤当下。从这个峰值出发，理论上你能窥见其他系统，但无法理解所见之物——因为你缺乏适当的根本假设，明白吗。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: In our past sessions I have explained time distortions, and you are familiar with the spacious present. So it should be no surprise to realize that basically the future is in existence now, and the past has never been swept away. In your physical field you merely look away, or turn your focus from one point to another.
quotes.translation: 在过去的课程中，我曾解释过时间扭曲，你们对"广袤的当下"也已熟悉。因此，认识到未来本质上此刻已然存在，而过去从未被抹去，这不应令你惊讶。在你们的物质场域中，你们只是移开视线，或将焦点从一点转向另一点。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Space travel, in your terms, will develop in a seemingly extravagant and startling fashion, only to be dumped as such when your scientists discover that space as you know it is a distortion, and that journeying from one so-called galaxy to another is done by divesting the physical body from camouflage. The vehicle of so-called space travel is mental and psychic mobility, in terms of psychic transformation of energy, enabling spontaneous and instantaneous mobility through the spacious present.
quotes.translation: 以你们的说法，太空旅行将以看似铺张惊人的方式发展，但终将被弃置——当你们的科学家发现你们所认知的空间是一种扭曲，而从一个所谓星系到另一个星系的旅行，实则是通过剥离伪装物质身体来实现的。所谓太空旅行的载具是心智与灵性的机动性，以能量灵性转化的方式，使人能通过"广袤的当下"实现自发而瞬时的移动。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: You understand the concept of the spacious present. It appears to you of course that this room and everything within it is more or less in constant existence, between the limitations of its creation or manufacture, and death or material decay. Within the time structure of your perception, this chair for example has been in constant existence since you purchased it.
quotes.translation: 你们理解"广袤的当下"这个概念。在你们看来，这个房间及其中的一切，在其创造或制造与消亡或物质腐朽的界限之间，或多或少是持续存在的。例如这把椅子，在你们感知的时间结构里，自购买以来便一直存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: You are doing so now. Ruburt is doing so now. Your lack of success lately with psychological time has been to a large measure caused by too great a conscious concentration upon the task. An emotional acceptance, distasteful as this may seem to Ruburt, is the answer here, and again a sensual immersion in the spacious present and in nature will refresh you here.
quotes.translation: 你此刻正在这样做。鲁柏此刻也在这样做。你们近来在心理时间方面的成效不足，很大程度上源于对这项任务过于刻意的意识专注。情感上的接纳——尽管这对鲁柏而言可能令人不悦——才是关键所在，而再次沉浸于"广袤的当下"与自然之中，将使你们在此处焕然一新。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: （See the 4lst session for Seth's first long dissertation on the spacious present. This was delivered April 6. The 44th session includes much on the basic laws of the inner universe also, as do the other sessions received during this period. As this material continues to expand it becomes more difficult to pinpoint references on a subject to a given few pages.）
quotes.translation: （参见第41节课，那是赛斯首次就"广袤的当下"发表长篇论述，于4月6日传达。第44节课也包含大量关于内在宇宙基本法则的内容，此期间接收的其他课程亦如此。随着这些资料不断扩展，要将某个主题的参考内容精确锁定在特定几页上已愈发困难。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Now we may possibly develop into a newer gestalt, for I cannot see all portions--underline all portions--of the spacious present. There are still veils before my eyes. This is a part of the present I do not perceive. If so, it will be one in which identities are completely retained, and there is no question of a dominancy, but of a smooth-working organization.
quotes.translation: 现在我们或许能发展成一种更新的完形，因为我尚无法看清"广袤的当下"的全部部分——请强调"全部部分"。我的眼前仍有面纱。这是我尚未感知到的当下的一部分。若真如此，那将是一个身份完全保留的完形，不存在主导权问题，而是运作流畅的组织形态。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Now if you wish, Quality-depth operates within the value climate of psychological reality, and gives truly amazing dimension to the spacious present, which is contained within the value climate of psychological reality.
quotes.translation: 如果你愿意，品质深度在心理实相的价值气候中运作，并赋予包含在心理实相价值气候中的广阔当下真正惊人的维度。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: （At this time also, while trying to visualize a method of diagramming the spacious present, I saw an animated graph consisting of long black jointed sticks thrusting up from a common base, at various angles. Then I saw the angled pieces eventually lay themselves down upon the base line so that I couldn't tell one from another, or beginning from the end.
quotes.translation: （此时，在试图想象绘制广阔当下的方法时，我看到一个动画图表，由从共同基座以不同角度向上伸出的黑色长关节棒组成。接着我看到这些有角度的部分最终平躺在基线上，以至于我无法区分彼此，也无法分辨起点与终点。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Now that you know something about the nature of matter, you will see that all matter is objectified mental action, and that basically such action happens simultaneously in the spacious present, formed by individualized energy through the formation of mental enclosures.
quotes.translation: 既然你对物质的性质有所了解，你会看到所有物质都是客观化的心智行动，而基本上这种行动在广阔当下中同时发生，由个体化能量通过心智围场的形成而塑造。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Even in our discussions we use the terms past, present and future, but I have told you that your future can influence your past, and that the spacious present is the only time reality.
quotes.translation: 即使在我们的讨论中，我们也使用过去、现在和未来这些术语，但我告诉过你，你的未来可以影响你的过去，而广阔当下是唯一的时间实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: For one thing the self is usually thought of in terms of existence only within one particular time sequence pattern. Its experience however is rooted in the past, as you think of the past. Since there is actually only a spacious present this means that the self is rooted both in the past and in the future, using your terms.
quotes.translation: 首先，自我通常被认为只存在于一个特定的时间序列模式中。然而，它的经验根植于过去，如你所理解的过去。由于实际上只有一个广阔当下，这意味着用你的术语来说，自我既根植于过去，也根植于未来。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: You may if you wish consider the Quality-depth principle as blowing like a wind through the spacious present, it indeed being like a wind in that it is known by its effects; and if you must think of it visually it would, perhaps, have a funnel shape. All of these concepts are most difficult to translate into word patterns.
quotes.translation: 如果你愿意，你可以将品质深度原则视为像风一样吹过广阔当下，它确实像风一样，通过其效果而被知晓；如果你必须用视觉来思考它，它或许会呈现漏斗形状。所有这些概念都极难转化为文字模式。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: In actuality you see, these separate existences occur simultaneously. It is only the ego who makes the time distinction. The various existences are not perceivable by you, or rather they are not perceivable to the ego. In a basic manner, as you know, the past, present and future exist at once in the spacious present.
quotes.translation: 实际上你看，这些分离的存在是同时发生的。只有自我才做出时间区分。这些不同的存在你无法感知，或者说自我无法感知。从根本上说，如你所知，过去、现在和未来同时存在于广袤的当下。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: There is a truth behind your cause and effect theory but it is far from what you imagine, and has nothing to do with continuity. This may be difficult at this point to imagine, but a durability such as that of the spacious present has nothing to do with your idea of continuity in terms of a present, past and future.
quotes.translation: 你的因果理论背后有一个真理，但它远非你所想象的那样，与连续性毫无关系。此刻这可能难以想象，但像广袤的当下这样的持久性，与你关于现在、过去和未来的连续性概念毫无关系。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Also I mentioned that the spacious present knows no beginning or end, and that energy, of which everything is composed, can never be withdrawn. Nor can individualized energy ever lose its individuality, nor in a very actual sense can anything which has ever existed go out of existence, but merely change its form.
quotes.translation: 我还提到广袤的当下没有开始或结束，构成一切的能量永远不会被撤回。个体化的能量也永远不会失去其个体性，从非常真实的意义上说，任何曾经存在过的事物都不会消失，而只是改变其形式。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: I could not have explained moment points to you, for example, until I had clearly given the idea of the spacious present. It is not as simple a thing as it might seem, for there is no coercion involved, Ruburt always consenting to let me push concepts at him, which he interprets speech-wise with my assistance.
quotes.translation: 例如，除非我先清楚地阐述广袤的当下的概念，否则我无法向你解释"瞬间点"。这并不像看起来那么简单，因为其中没有强迫，鲁柏总是同意让我向他灌输概念，而他在我的协助下将这些概念转化为言语。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: We will only concern ourselves with a few, those of which I am at least partially familiar. These planes of actuality, of course, all operate within the spacious present, and with a value climate. While portions of them may protrude into physical actuality, they will do so with varying proportion.
quotes.translation: 我们只关注少数几个，那些我至少部分熟悉的。这些实相层面当然都在广袤的当下内运作，并带有价值气候。虽然它们的一部分可能突入物质实相，但会以不同的比例进行。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Realities merge, one into the other. Personalities, or any type of individualized energy, may pass through various realities. The appearance of energy in one form could be said to end in that form were it not for the existence of the spacious present, in which all realities are simultaneous.
quotes.translation: 实相相互融合。人格或任何类型的个体化能量可以穿越各种实相。如果没有广袤的当下（其中所有实相都是同时存在的），能量以一种形式出现可以说在该形式中结束。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: I admit to you reincarnation does seem to have such implications. This is simply because you insist upon considering reincarnation in the light of time theories that are themselves incorrect. You must instead consider reincarnation in the light of what you know of the spacious present.
quotes.translation: 我向你承认，转世确实看似具有这样的含义。这仅仅是因为你坚持用本身就不正确的时间理论来思考转世。相反，你必须根据你对"广袤当下"的了解来思考转世。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: The use of psychological time will make the experience of death much less frightening. You will already have learned to recognize the spacious present for what it is, and the conscious ego will not be so bewildered and confused by the sudden perception that is involved.
quotes.translation: 使用心理时间将使死亡的体验不那么可怕。你将已经学会认识"广袤当下"的本质，而有意识的自我也不会被涉及到的突然感知所困惑和混乱。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Physically therefore the house that you will live in within five years may not exist, in your terms, now. It may not have been built yet, therefore physically you do not perceive it. Such a house however does have form, and does exist within the spacious present.
quotes.translation: 因此，从物质层面来说，你五年后将居住的房子，用你们的说法，现在可能并不存在。它可能尚未建成，因此从物质层面你无法感知到它。然而，这样的房子确实具有形态，并且确实存在于"广袤当下"之中。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: They exist in actuality, but not in a form with which ordinarily you would be familiar. The neutrality is protective, a duration within the spacious present, where nevertheless there is a certain acceleration in terms of value fulfillment.
quotes.translation: 它们确实存在，但并非以你通常熟悉的形式存在。这种中立性是保护性的，是"广袤当下"中的一个持续时段，然而在价值完成方面却存在着某种加速。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: There can be order without a succession of moments. There can be order, believe it or not, without your cause and effect. There can be order, and there is order, in spontaneity, and in the simultaneous existence of the spacious present.
quotes.translation: 没有连续的时刻也可以有秩序。信不信由你，没有你们的因果也可以有秩序。在自发性中，在"广袤当下"的同时性存在中，可以有秩序，也确实有秩序。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Now. The mind as opposed to the brain, perceives time in terms of the spacious present. It is true that the mind works on associative principles. Therefore these associations are drawn not only from the past, but also from the future.
quotes.translation: 现在。与大脑相对的心智，以"广袤当下"的方式感知时间。心智确实依据联想原则运作。因此，这些联想不仅来自过去，也来自未来。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Seven: The spacious present is here more available to the perceptions.
quotes.translation: 七：在此，广袤的当下更易于被感知所触及。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json
